name: Justin Amash
summary: Former Republican congressman who became the first GOP House member to call for Trump's impeachment after the Mueller report and later left the Republican Party.

keyStatements.quote: President Trump has engaged in impeachable conduct.
Attorney General Barr has intentionally misrepresented Mueller's report.
Today, I am declaring my independence and leaving the Republican Party.

timeline.event: Called for impeachment after Mueller report
timeline.significance: First GOP House member to do so

credibility.background: Former U.S. Representative, first Republican to call for Trump's impeachment, constitutional conservative
positions: Member, Michigan State House of Representatives (2009-2011)

oppositionReasons: Said Trump engaged in impeachable conduct
Left the Republican Party over Trump-era politics

sources.title: Justin Amash tweet thread on impeachment
Justin Amash: I'm leaving the Republican Party
